# RPG Trading Agent System - Part 4: Database, API & Frontend

**Focus:** Data persistence, API endpoints, frontend components, deployment

---

## 1. Database Schema (PostgreSQL + Prisma)

### 1.1 Core Tables

**Signal Table** - Trading signals generated by agents
```prisma
model Signal {
  id                  String   @id @default(uuid())
  timestamp           DateTime @default(now())
  symbol              String
  type                String              // "BREAKOUT", "TREND", "REVERSAL", etc.
  strength            Float               // 0-100
  confidence          Float               // 0-1
  price               Float
  reasoning           Json                // Why signal generated
  riskReward          Float
  stopLoss            Float
  takeProfit          Float
  momentumLabel       String?
  regimeState         String?             // "TRENDING", "RANGING", etc.
  legacyLabel         String?
  signalStrengthScore Float?
  userId              String?
  
  @@index([symbol])
  @@index([timestamp])
}
```

**Trade Table** - Executed trades
```prisma
model Trade {
  id         String    @id @default(uuid())
  symbol     String
  side       String              // "BUY" or "SELL"
  entryTime  DateTime
  exitTime   DateTime?
  entryPrice Float
  exitPrice  Float?
  quantity   Float
  pnl        Float?              // Profit/Loss
  commission Float     @default(0)
  status     String    @default("OPEN")  // "OPEN", "CLOSED", "ERROR"
  
  @@index([symbol])
  @@index([entryTime])
}
```

**MarketFrame Table** - Raw market data snapshots
```prisma
model MarketFrame {
  id                   String   @id @default(uuid())
  timestamp            DateTime @default(now())
  symbol               String
  price                Json                // { open, high, low, close }
  volume               Float
  indicators           Json                // { rsi, macd, ema, etc. }
  orderFlow            Json                // { bid, ask, imbalance }
  marketMicrostructure Json                // { spread, depth }
  
  @@index([symbol, timestamp])
}
```

**Strategy Table** - Strategy definitions and performance
```prisma
model Strategy {
  id          String           @id @default(uuid())
  name        String
  description String
  riskParams  Json             // Risk parameters
  performance Json             // Historical stats
  isActive    Boolean          @default(true)
  backtests   BacktestResult[]
  
  @@index([name])
}
```

**BacktestResult Table** - Historical backtest runs
```prisma
model BacktestResult {
  id             String   @id @default(uuid())
  strategyId     String
  startDate      DateTime
  endDate        DateTime
  initialCapital Float
  finalCapital   Float
  performance    Json             // { sharpe, maxDrawdown, winRate }
  equityCurve    Json             // Array of equity over time
  monthlyReturns Json
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
  metrics        Json
  trades         Json             // Array of trades
  strategy       Strategy @relation(fields: [strategyId], references: [id])
  
  @@index([strategyId])
  @@index([createdAt])
}
```

**User Table** - User management
```prisma
model User {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid())
  email           String?  @unique
  firstName       String?
  lastName        String?
  profileImageUrl String?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @default(now()) @updatedAt
  preferences     UserPreference?
  apiKeys         ApiKey[]
  watchlist       Watchlist[]
  portfolio       Portfolio?
}
```

**Portfolio Table** - User portfolio holdings
```prisma
model Portfolio {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId    String   @unique
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  holdings  Json     @default("[]")     // Array of asset holdings
  totalCost Float    @default(0)
  updatedAt DateTime @default(now()) @updatedAt
}
```

**Watchlist Table** - User watchlist for assets
```prisma
model Watchlist {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  symbol    String
  addedAt   DateTime @default(now())
  notes     String?
  
  @@unique([userId, symbol])
  @@index([userId])
}
```

**ScanRun Table** - Scanner execution history
```prisma
model ScanRun {
  id         String   @id @default(uuid())
  scanId     String   @unique
  timestamp  DateTime @default(now())
  timeframe  String?
  symbolCount Int     @default(0)
  payload    Json                // Scan results
}
```

### 1.2 Additional Metadata Tables

**Session Table** - User sessions
```prisma
model Session {
  sid    String   @id
  sess   Json
  expire DateTime
  
  @@index([expire])
}
```

**UserPreference Table** - User settings
```prisma
model UserPreference {
  id                    String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId                String   @unique
  user                  User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  theme                 String   @default("dark")
  defaultTimeframe      String   @default("1h")
  defaultExchange       String   @default("binance")
  // ... 20+ more preferences
}
```

**ApiKey Table** - User API keys for integrations
```prisma
model ApiKey {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  key       String   @unique
  name      String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  
  @@index([userId])
}
```

---

## 2. API Endpoints (40+ routes)

### 2.1 RPG Agent Endpoints

```
GET  /api/rpg-agents/leaderboard
     → Returns leaderboard sorted by points (level, wins, profits, achievements)

GET  /api/rpg-agents/status/:agentName
     → Agent detail: level, XP, skills, abilities, mood, rank, stats

GET  /api/rpg-agents/all
     → All agents with current status and performance

GET  /api/rpg-agents/combos
     → Available combos and their history

GET  /api/rpg-agents/live-activities
     → Recent agent trades/level-ups/achievements

POST /api/rpg-agents/process-market
     → Process market data through all agents, generate signals

POST /api/rpg-agents/upgrade-skill
     Body: { agentName, skill }
     → Upgrade a skill with skill points

POST /api/rpg-agents/spawn
     Body: { parentAgentName, specialization }
     → Spawn sub-agent from level 25+ agent

POST /api/rpg-agents/update-performance
     Body: { agentName, tradeResult }
     → Update agent after trade execution
```

**Example Responses:**

```json
// GET /api/rpg-agents/leaderboard
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "agent_name": "BreakoutHunter_Alpha",
      "rank": "GOLD",
      "level": 18,
      "points": 12850,
      "win_rate": 0.61,
      "profit_factor": 2.45,
      "sharpe": 1.8,
      "total_profit": 4250
    },
    ...
  ]
}

// GET /api/rpg-agents/status/BreakoutHunter_Alpha
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {

}
```

### 2.2 Signal Processing Endpoints

```
GET  /api/signals/
     Query: { symbol?, timeframe?, confidence_min? }
     → List signals with filters

GET  /api/signals/:id
     → Signal detail with full reasoning

POST /api/signals/backtest
     Body: { symbol, startDate, endDate, strategy }
     → Backtest a strategy on historical data

POST /api/signals/consensus
     Body: { symbol, signals }
     → Calculate aggregate signal from multiple sources
```

### 2.3 Trading Execution Endpoints

```
POST /api/trade-execution/decision
     Body: { signal, portfolio }
     → Get execution decision (size, entry, stops)

GET  /api/trade-execution/status
     → Current open trades and positions

POST /api/trade-execution/record-outcome
     Body: { tradeId, exitPrice, outcome }
     → Record trade exit and performance

POST /api/trade-execution/reset
     → Reset all trades (caution - live only)
```

### 2.4 Strategy Management Endpoints

```
GET  /api/strategies/
     → List all strategies

GET  /api/strategies/:id
     → Strategy detail

POST /api/strategies/:id/execute
     Body: { symbol, capital }
     → Execute strategy on asset

POST /api/strategies/backtest/run
     Body: { strategy, data }
     → Run backtest

GET  /api/strategies/backtest/results
     → Historical backtest results

DELETE /api/strategies/backtest/:id
     → Delete backtest result
```

### 2.5 Market Data Endpoints

```
GET  /api/market/price/:symbol
     → Current price from aggregator

GET  /api/market/frames/:symbol
     Query: { timeframe, limit }
     → OHLCV data

GET  /api/market/indicators/:symbol
     → Technical indicators

GET  /api/market/regime
     → Current market regime detection
```

### 2.6 User & Portfolio Endpoints

```
GET  /api/user/preferences
     → User settings

POST /api/user/preferences/settings
     Body: { theme, timeframe, ... }
     → Update settings

GET  /api/portfolio
     → User portfolio summary

POST /api/watchlist
     Body: { symbol }
     → Add to watchlist

GET  /api/watchlist
     → Get watchlist
```

---

## 3. WebSocket Real-Time Updates

### 3.1 WebSocket Connections

```typescript
// Client connects to:
ws://localhost:3000/ws/trading

// Server emits events:
socket.emit('signal:new', signal);           // New signal generated
socket.emit('trade:opened', trade);          // Trade opened
socket.emit('trade:closed', trade);          // Trade closed
socket.emit('agent:level-up', agent);        // Agent leveled up
socket.emit('agent:achievement', achievement); // Achievement unlocked
socket.emit('combo:activated', combo);       // Combo activated
socket.emit('price:update', {symbol, price}); // Price update
socket.emit('leaderboard:update', leaderboard); // Leaderboard changed
```

### 3.2 WebSocket Event Flow

```
Client subscribes to events:
  - socket.on('signal:new', handler)
  - socket.on('trade:opened', handler)
  - socket.on('price:update', handler)
  
Server publishes events:
  ┌─────────────────────────┐
  │ Agent generates signal   │
  └────────────┬────────────┘
               ↓
       socket.emit('signal:new')
               ↓
       All connected clients receive
               ↓
       Update UI in real-time (no refresh needed)
```

---

## 4. Frontend Components

### 4.1 Main Pages

| Page | Purpose | Status |
|------|---------|--------|
| **Dashboard** | Main trading overview | ✅ |
| **Agent Arena Hub** | All agents, leaderboard, combos | ✅ |
| **Agent Details** | Individual agent full view | ✅ |
| **Signals** | Signal generation, filtering | ✅ |
| **Trading Terminal** | Live trade execution | ✅ |
| **Paper Trading** | Backtest/simulation | ✅ |
| **Strategies** | Strategy management | ✅ |
| **Analytics** | Performance charts | ✅ |
| **Portfolio** | Holdings management | ✅ |
| **Settings** | User preferences | ✅ |
| **Market Intelligence** | Regime, orderflow analysis | ✅ |
| **Learning Center** | Educational content | ✅ |

### 4.2 Agent UI Components

**AgentStatusCard** - Shows agent in leaderboard/grid view
```
┌─────────────────────────────────┐
│  🔥 BreakoutHunter_Alpha        │
│  [GOLD] Level 18                │
├─────────────────────────────────┤
│ XP: 650 / 5,063  [██████░░░░]  │
│                                 │
│ Win Rate: 61%    Profit: +$4.2k │
│ Sharpe: 1.8      Rank: 3rd      │
│                                 │
│ 🏆 5 achievements                │
│ 💪 Pattern Rec. 8/10            │
└─────────────────────────────────┘
```

**AgentDetailView** - Full agent page with all stats
```
HEADER:
- Agent name, type, level, XP bar
- Mood emoji & description
- Rank badge, achievements count

TABS:
1. Overview (stats, recent trades)
2. Skills (skill levels, upgrade buttons)
3. Abilities (unlocked abilities list)
4. Achievements (all badges)
5. Trade History (recent trades)
6. Learning (performance graphs)
```

## 5. Deployment Configuration

### 5.1 Docker Setup

```dockerfile
# Dockerfile
FROM node:20-alpine

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci

COPY . .

RUN npm run build

EXPOSE 3000 5173

CMD ["npm", "start"]
```

```yaml
# docker-compose.yml
version: '3.8'

services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:15
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      POSTGRES_DB: scanstream
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"

  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
      - "5173:5173"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:${DB_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/scanstream
      NODE_ENV: production
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    volumes:
      - ./:/app
      - /app/node_modules

volumes:
  postgres_data:
```

### 5.2 Environment Configuration

```env
# .env
NODE_ENV=production
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost/scanstream

# Trading
INITIAL_CAPITAL=100000
MAX_POSITION_SIZE_PCT=2
MAX_DRAWDOWN_PCT=20

# Exchanges
BINANCE_API_KEY=xxx
BINANCE_API_SECRET=xxx
KRAKEN_API_KEY=xxx
KRAKEN_API_SECRET=xxx

# ML Models
ML_MODEL_PATH=/models
USE_GPU=false

# Logging
LOG_LEVEL=info
LOG_FILE=/var/log/scanstream.log
```

---

## 6. Performance Metrics

### 6.1 System Load Capacity

```
Agents: 50 concurrent agents
Signals per minute: 100-500 depending on timeframe
Trades per agent: 10-50 per month
Database queries/sec: 50-200
WebSocket connections: 10-50 concurrent users
```

### 6.2 Response Times

```
GET  /api/rpg-agents/leaderboard     : ~50ms
GET  /api/rpg-agents/status/:name    : ~30ms
POST /api/rpg-agents/process-market  : ~200-500ms
GET  /api/signals/                   : ~100ms
POST /api/trade-execution/decision   : ~150ms
```
